source_idiom: ยักษ์มักกะสัน
source_meaning: cruel or ruthless person
target_meaning: extremely cruel and brutal

source_idiom: ร่มเย็น
source_meaning: calm and serene; peaceful; being at peace; being at ease; free from disturbance, trouble, anxiety, or the like.
target_meaning: the tranquil and desolate scenery in Buddhist temples

source_idiom: ปลาซิวปลาสร้อย
target_idiom: anh chột làm vua xứ mù
source_meaning: minnow: comparatively small or insignificant person.
target_meaning: a mediocre person without any special qualities who stands out only because they are surrounded by people worse than them; big fish in a small pond

source_idiom: หอกข้างแคร่
source_meaning: close relative or friend who turns enemy; one's close relative or friend that turns or can at any time turn against one.
target_meaning: someone who badmouths or even goes out of their way to harm their siblings or friends who has a brotherly bond with them

source_idiom: ไม่ได้ด้วยเล่ห์ก็เอาด้วยกล ไม่ได้ด้วยมนตร์ก็เอาด้วยคาถา
source_meaning: alternative spelling of ไม่ได้ด้วยเล่ห์ก็เอาด้วยกล ไม่ได้ด้วยมนต์ก็เอาด้วยคาถา (mâi-dâai-dûai-lêe-gɔ̂-ao-dûai-gon mâi-dâai-dûai-mon-gɔ̂-ao-dûai-kaa-tǎa)
target_meaning: alternative spelling of bất đắc kì tử

source_idiom: เล็กพริกขี้หนู
source_meaning: small, tiny, or young, but surprisingly able, clever, wise, smart, harsh, severe, poisonous, or capable of causing widespread or serious destruction or impact.
target_meaning: little body, great mind

source_idiom: ป้ายสี
source_meaning: to slander; to smear; to sully, vilify, or soil a good name, reputation, etc.
target_meaning: to tarnish; to besmirch

source_idiom: ผีเน่ากับโลงผุ
source_meaning: bad or low persons deserving each other.
target_meaning: birds of a feather flock together

source_idiom: แก้วลืมคอน
target_idiom: cáo chết ba năm quay đầu về núi
source_meaning: A person who forgets his home or family in a rural area after living in an urban area.
target_meaning: a person always longs for home

source_idiom: กินข้าวแดง
source_meaning: to be imprisoned for a crime.
target_meaning: to be long gone and nowhere to be found, especially after committing a crime

source_idiom: บังเกิดเกล้า
source_meaning: biological; natural.
target_meaning: homegrown

source_idiom: เอามะพร้าวห้าวไปขายสวน
source_meaning: to show off one's knowledge to someone who is more knowledgeable.
target_meaning: to be arrogant despite one's ignorance; to be egotistical

source_idiom: ปีหน้าฟ้าใหม่
source_meaning: new year; next year; year to come; year ahead.
target_meaning: soonish; in the coming days

source_idiom: ซื้อเวลา
source_meaning: to buy time.
target_meaning: to save some money just in case one may need it.

source_idiom: คับที่อยู่ได้คับใจอยู่ยาก
source_meaning: it is hard to live in a place which makes you feel uncomfortable or unhappy, though it is a big or luxurious place; but a place which provides ease or happiness can be lived in, though it is a tight or small place.
target_meaning: a safe haven; a place with beneficial living conditions, suitable for growth

source_idiom: หัวขี้เลื่อย
target_idiom: đầu óc ngu si, tứ chi phát triển
source_meaning: stupid; idiotic; unintelligent.
target_meaning: apparently healthy, stout and sturdy even, but very stupid

source_idiom: โจรห้าร้อย
source_meaning: bold, reckless criminal or outlaw.
target_meaning: a thug (a criminal who treats others violently or roughly)

source_idiom: เล่นกับหมา หมาเลียปาก
source_meaning: alternative form of เล่นกับหมาหมาเลียปาก (lên-gàp-mǎa-mǎa-liia-bpàak)
target_meaning: synonym of đụ má (“fuck”)

source_idiom: นกต่อ
source_meaning: decoy; bait; lure
target_meaning: to lure an opponent out; to get rid of an opponent or a problem to achieve one's goal

source_idiom: ใบ้แดก
source_meaning: to be temporarily deprived of speech, especially by strong emotion.
target_meaning: to be rooted to the spot; to be unable to move due to fear, surprise, or other strong emotions.

source_idiom: รำชั่วโทษพาทย์
source_meaning: To blame another person for one's own fault.
target_meaning: to take out one's anger on someone who was not at fault

source_idiom: ไข้ใจ
source_meaning: heartache; heartsickness.
target_meaning: Achilles heel; weakness

source_idiom: ขมิ้นกับปูน
source_meaning: incompatible; irreconcilable; disagreeing; typified by arguments, fights, or disagreements.
target_meaning: discordant and intolerable

source_idiom: แผลเก่า
source_meaning: unforgettable painful memory.
target_meaning: stamped or etched in one's memory; unforgettable

source_idiom: เอาถ่าน
source_meaning: to be serious, to be earnest, to be industrious.
target_meaning: to work diligently and submissively

source_idiom: คางคกขึ้นวอ
source_meaning: low person who puts on airs after having a better life or gaining wealth or admiration.
target_meaning: to have ups and downs in one's life; to go from rags to riches and/or riches to rags; to move up and down the socioeconomic ladder

source_idiom: เสียงลือเสียงเล่าอ้าง
source_meaning: rumour.
target_meaning: unfounded rumours and malicious gossip

source_idiom: ใต้ดิน
source_meaning: concealed; illegal
target_meaning: any act carried out so clandestinely and secretly that all traces are erased, especially illicit affairs

source_idiom: คารมเป็นต่อ รูปหล่อเป็นรอง
source_meaning: Those who are handsome will lose to those who are funny.
target_meaning: both sides loses

source_idiom: ตาถั่ว
source_meaning: unable to see or find things even though one has good eyes.
target_meaning: bleary-eyed

source_idiom: งมเข็มในมหาสมุทร
source_meaning: to look for a needle in a haystack.
target_meaning: to look for a needle in a haystack; literally "to blindly look for a needle at the bottom of the ocean"

source_idiom: ม้ามืด
source_meaning: dark horse
target_meaning: side job

source_idiom: สิ้นไร้ไม้ตอก
source_meaning: very impoverished; experiencing serious financial hardship; penniless; penurious; extremely poor; needy.
target_meaning: so damn broke; so financially wanting

source_idiom: ตามใจปากลำบากท้อง
source_meaning: If you have eyes bigger than your stomach, you will suffer.
target_meaning: having eyes bigger than one's stomach

source_idiom: ดินพอกหางหมู
source_meaning: having tasks all piled up; up to one's neck in work.
target_meaning: to be heavily indebted

source_idiom: มีอันจะกิน
source_meaning: comfortably off; well-to-do.
target_meaning: (giàu~) to be loaded; to be filthy rich

source_idiom: เอาใจเขามาใส่ใจเรา
source_meaning: to put oneself in someone's shoes.
target_meaning: follow in someone's footsteps

source_idiom: เสือผู้หญิง
source_meaning: lady's man; womanizer.
target_meaning: A younger man who loves or dates older women.

source_idiom: เอาลูกเขามาเลี้ยงเอาเมี่ยงเขามาอม
source_meaning: To take another person's duty or burden which can result in something unexpectable or unfavourable.
target_meaning: to take on unnecessary burden; to bring trouble upon oneself

source_idiom: หักหลัง
source_meaning: to betray.
target_meaning: to be treacherous

source_idiom: เข้าด้ายเข้าเข็ม
source_meaning: Likely to be unsuccessful if interrupted by anything.
target_meaning: after three attempts, the chance of the success decreases greatly

source_idiom: หมาวัด
source_meaning: man of low status who wishes for a woman of high status as his lover.
target_meaning: someone of high status has paid a visit to someone of low status

source_idiom: อาหารตา
source_meaning: feast for the eyes; eye candy.
target_meaning: choice viands; choice delicacies; luxury gourmet food

source_idiom: กลัวเหมือนหนูกลัวแมว
source_meaning: to be cowardly.
target_meaning: to value one's life so much to the point of being cowardly

source_idiom: หาเสียง
source_meaning: to win voter support, as through electoral campaigns.
target_meaning: to get wins after wins; to rake victories

source_idiom: ไม่ได้ด้วยเล่ห์ก็เอาด้วยกล ไม่ได้ด้วยมนต์ก็เอาด้วยคาถา
source_meaning: to use any method possible.
target_meaning: by hook or by crook; by every possible means

source_idiom: ร้อยวันพันปี
source_meaning: once in a long time; once in a blue moon; very rarely; very seldom.
target_meaning: once in a blue moon; once in a thousand years

source_idiom: ถือไม้เท้ายอดทอง กระบองยอดเพชร
source_meaning: an expression used to wish a married couple longevity and prosperity.
target_meaning: may you have a safe journey; bon voyage

source_idiom: หูเบา
source_meaning: easily believing in what one hears; willing to believe too readily; credulous.
target_meaning: to take something (usually a fraudulent claim) as a matter of fact without further inspection; to be too credulous

source_idiom: นานเท่านาน
source_meaning: for a very long period of time; for the longest time possible
target_meaning: overlong

source_idiom: ทุกหย่อมหญ้า
source_meaning: everywhere; every place; all places; all regions; all districts; universally; generally
target_meaning: all-encompassing; totally inclusive; affecting all things

source_idiom: บอกหนังสือสังฆราช
source_meaning: alternative form of สอนหนังสือสังฆราช (sɔ̌ɔn-nǎng-sʉ̌ʉ-sǎng-ká-râat)
target_meaning: alternative form of long trời lở đất

source_idiom: ผู้หญิงยิงเรือ
source_meaning: woman.
target_meaning: woman of unrivalled beauty

source_idiom: ปีกกล้าขาแข็ง
source_meaning: to be no longer needing to rely on someone else for help or support; to be capable of supporting or depending on oneself.
target_meaning: to do things by oneself; to stand on one's own two feet

source_idiom: ฟางเส้นสุดท้าย
source_meaning: last straw.
target_meaning: the straw that broke the camel's back

source_idiom: กะโหลกกะลา
source_meaning: useless; valueless; worthless.
target_meaning: inconsequential; meaningless

source_idiom: หัวร้างข้างแตก
source_meaning: to undergo serious physical injury
target_meaning: to do something extremely dangerous

source_idiom: การสาวไส้
source_meaning: abstract noun of สาวไส้ (sǎao-sâi)
target_meaning: chữ Hán form of âm thịnh dương suy (“(informal, figurative, of a place) having more females than males”)
